metadata.description: Product Marketing Skills for B2B SaaS PMMs — positioning, GTM strategy, competitive intelligence, execution frameworks, and workflow orchestration

plugins.name: pmm-go-to-market
plugins.description: Go-to-market strategy, tier assignment, and workflow orchestration for product launches, positioning refresh, competitive programs, and quarterly PMM cycles

plugins.name: pmm-positioning
plugins.description: Strategic positioning and messaging using April Dunford's framework

plugins.name: pmm-execution
plugins.description: Day-to-day PMM execution: PRDs, OKRs, pre-mortems, retros, stakeholder maps, interviews, experiments, and prioritization

plugins.name: pmm-toolkit
plugins.description: PMM utilities: writing assistant, resume review, privacy policy generator, GACCS briefs

plugins.name: pmm-meta
plugins.description: Meta skills for skill quality and session learning: review, learn, verify
